description: Fraudsters promise unrealistic returns through fake trading platforms, crypto schemes, task-based investments, IPO allotments or wealth management offers to steal deposits and personal information.
recommended_actions: Do not transfer more money to unlock withdrawals or profits.
Verify brokers and investment platforms through SEBI, RBI or official exchange records.
Report financial fraud immediately by calling 1930.
Preserve chats, bank receipts, UPI IDs, wallet addresses, app links and website URLs.
Contact your bank to attempt transaction blocking or recall.

rules.name: Guaranteed High Returns
rules.explanation: Promises unusually high or guaranteed returns, which is a strong indicator of investment fraud.
examples: Invest Rs 5000 and get guaranteed 20% daily profit.
Risk free plan with assured monthly income.

rules.name: Withdrawal Blocked Until Fee
rules.explanation: Victims are asked to pay taxes, fees or verification charges before withdrawing fake profits.
examples: Pay 18% GST to release your trading profit.
Your withdrawal is pending. Deposit verification fee to unlock.

rules.name: Fake Trading App or Website
rules.explanation: Directs the victim to a fake app or website that displays fabricated balances and profits.
examples: Install our private trading app and recharge your wallet.
Your profit is visible on the platform. Deposit more to upgrade.

rules.name: Crypto or Forex Scheme
rules.explanation: Uses crypto, forex or wallet transfers to move funds into hard-to-recover channels.
examples: Send USDT to this wallet and earn daily forex profit.
Join our crypto mining plan for guaranteed returns.

rules.name: SEBI RBI or Exchange Impersonation
rules.explanation: Misuses names of Indian regulators or exchanges to appear legitimate without verifiable registration.
examples: We are SEBI registered. Deposit today for premium plan.
RBI approved investment scheme with fixed profit.

rules.name: Telegram WhatsApp Investment Group
rules.explanation: Uses private groups and fake testimonials to build trust before asking for investment deposits.
examples: Join our VIP Telegram group for guaranteed profits.
Our WhatsApp members earned Rs 50000 today.

rules.name: Small Profit Then Larger Deposit
rules.explanation: Shows small initial profits or successful withdrawals to convince the victim to deposit larger amounts.
examples: You completed level 1. Deposit more to unlock VIP profit.
Recharge Rs 50000 to move to higher earning plan.

rules.name: Fake IPO or Pre IPO Allotment
rules.explanation: Promises guaranteed IPO or pre-IPO allotment outside official broker and exchange channels.
examples: Guaranteed IPO allotment available. Transfer money today.
Pre-IPO shares at discount for selected investors.

rules.name: Task Based Investment Recharge
rules.explanation: Combines job or task fraud with repeated investment-style deposits to unlock commissions.
examples: Complete prepaid merchant tasks to earn commission.
Recharge Rs 10000 to unlock the next task.

rules.name: Urgent Limited Slot Pressure
rules.explanation: Creates urgency to prevent independent verification of the investment offer.
examples: Only 5 slots left. Deposit before market closing.
Today only plan. Join immediately for fixed profit.
